title.en: How to Read a Page of Talmud
title.zh: 如何阅读塔木德(Talmud)的一页

author: Torah Light Editorial Team
target_audience: Beginners seeking to understand how to approach Talmud study, particularly those from Chinese cultural backgrounds
cultural_parallels: Chinese classical text layout with commentaries
Thirteen Classics with Commentaries and Subcommentaries (十三经注疏)
Shiji (史记) with Jijie and Suoyin commentaries

sources.title: Babylonian Talmud
sources.description: The primary text discussed throughout the article

sources.title: Tosafot
sources.description: Commentaries by Rashi's descendants and students

sources.title: Sefaria.org
sources.description: Free digital access to Talmud with translations and commentaries

sources.title: Artscroll Schottenstein Talmud
sources.description: English translation with extensive explanatory notes

sources.title: Thirteen Classics with Commentaries and Subcommentaries (十三经注疏)
sources.description: Traditional Chinese classical texts with multi-layered commentaries, demonstrating similar scholarly traditions

summary.en: A comprehensive beginner's guide to understanding and reading a page of Talmud, explaining its unique layout with Mishnah, Gemara, Rashi, and Tosafot commentaries. Includes practical steps for study, common challenges, modern tools, and fascinating parallels to Chinese classical text traditions.
summary.zh: 全面的初学者指南,解释如何理解和阅读塔木德的一页,说明其独特的版面布局,包括米示拿、革马拉、拉希和托萨佛特注释。包括学习的实际步骤、常见挑战、现代工具,以及与中国经典文本传统的迷人相似之处。
summary.he: מדריך מקיף למתחילים להבנה וקריאה של דף גמרא, המסביר את הפריסה הייחודית שלו עם משנה, גמרא, רש"י ותוספות. כולל צעדים מעשיים ללימוד, אתגרים נפוצים, כלים מודרניים, והקבלות מרתקות למסורות טקסט קלאסי סיני.

teaching_points: Understanding the structure of a Talmud page
The roles of Mishnah, Gemara, Rashi, and Tosafot
Step-by-step approach to reading and comprehension
Modern tools and resources for learners
Cultural parallels to Chinese classical commentary traditions
The living conversation nature of Talmud study
